plan.action: Retrieve the list of zones based on the user's location
plan.why: To discover restaurants in the user's vicinity, we first need to identify the relevant zones.

plan.action: Fetch all available coupons for restaurants in the identified zones
plan.why: To provide discounts or special offers to the user.

plan.action: Retrieve links to all available coupons
plan.why: To provide direct access to the coupons for the user.

plan.action: Generate a report of the ordered coupons
plan.why: To keep track of the coupons the user has shown interest in.

plan.action: Store the selected coupons for the user
plan.why: To manage and keep a record of the coupons the user has chosen.
To ensure the user is eligible for the coupons and offers.
